name: sloth-d2c
description: Codex marketplace package for Sloth D2C.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-sloth-d2c-plugin.mjs && node --check plugins/sloth-d2c/scripts/sloth-d2c-state.mjs && node --check plugins/sloth-d2c/scripts/test-sloth-d2c-state.mjs && node --check plugins/sloth-d2c/scripts/start-workflow-dev.mjs && node plugins/sloth-d2c/scripts/test-sloth-d2c-state.mjs
